name: Warlock Armor of Agathys: temp HP + cold retaliation
description: Tests the Armor of Agathys level-1 spell: on self-cast, the Warlock gains 5 temp HP and installs a retaliatory_damage ActiveEffect for 5 cold damage. When a monster hits the Warlock with a melee attack, temp HP absorbs the damage AND the retaliation deals 5 cold back to the attacker. Verifies: (1) tempHp applied on cast, (2) temp HP absorbs damage before HP, (3) retaliatory damage fires on melee hit, (4) retaliation does NOT fire on ranged hits.

actions.comment: Assert starting tempHp = 0 before AoA is cast
Cast Armor of Agathys on self — self-cast simple action, applies temp_hp + retaliatory_damage immediately.

input.text: cast Armor of Agathys on myself

actions.comment: Assert 5 temp HP granted by the temp_hp effect on cast.
Queue brawler's single attack at warlock. Attack bonus +14 guarantees hit vs AC 14.
Queue dice: d20(10) attack roll (10+14=24 vs AC 14 HIT), 1d6 damage=6 (6+3=9). Temp HP (5) absorbs 5, 4 bleeds through to HP. Retaliation: 5 cold dmg to Brawler (30 -> 25).
End player turn — Brawler goes next and consumes the queued decision + dice.
Wait for the Brawler to execute its attack and control to return to player.
After Brawler's hit: warlock lost 5 temp HP (absorbed 5) plus 4 HP. Brawler took 5 cold from retaliation.
